verses.1: Don’t rejoice, Israel, to jubilation like the nations;
verses.2: The threshing floor and the wine press won’t feed them,
verses.3: They won’t dwell in the LORD’s land;
verses.4: They won’t pour out wine offerings to the LORD,
verses.5: What will you do in the day of solemn assembly,
verses.6: For, behold, when they flee destruction,
verses.7: The days of visitation have come.
verses.8: A prophet watches over Ephraim with my God.
verses.10: I found Israel like grapes in the wilderness.
verses.11: As for Ephraim, their glory will fly away like a bird.
verses.12: Though they bring up their children,
verses.13: I have seen Ephraim, like Tyre, planted in a pleasant place;
verses.14: Give them—LORD what will you give?
verses.17: My God will cast them away, because they didn’t listen to him;
